name: Molasses Crinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together shortening, sugar, egg, and molasses.
2. Sift the remaining ingredients together and add them to the mixture.
3. Chill the dough.
4. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
5. Roll the dough into balls about the size of large walnuts.
6. Dip the tops in sugar.
7. Place the cookies, sugar side up, about 3 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
8. Sprinkle each cookie with 2 or 3 drops of water to produce a crackled surface.
9. Bake until just set, not hard, about 10-12 minutes.
